calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-13-2003 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on a regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks: S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR: Patricia Dowling.
Petitioners, Betty Phan and Francisco Romero Guerra the parents of the minor present in pro per, were sworn and examined.
The Court grants the decree changing the minor's name to Diego Francisco Phan-Romero
Decree signed in open court.
